name: EdwLoadMbrRDSRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD,SRC_SYS_CD,SUBJ_CD,RUN_CYC_NO,'Y' as EDW_LOAD_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD='IDS' AND SUBJ_CD='MBR_RDS' AND EDW_LOAD_IN='N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}) UPDATE t SET t.EDW_LOAD_IN = cte.EDW_LOAD_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC as t JOIN cte ON t.TRGT_SYS_CD=cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND t.SRC_SYS_CD=cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND t.SUBJ_CD=cte.SUBJ_CD AND t.RUN_CYC_NO >= cte.RUN_CYC_NO AND t.EDW_LOAD_IN='N'

Description:
MODIFICATIONS:
Date                 Developer                Change Description
------------------      ----------------------------     --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2006-04-13      Suzanne Saylor          Original Programming.

2013-07-24       Archana Palivela        Original Programming.

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
IdsEdwMbrRDSRunCycUpd
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
